title: elatostema lineolatum var. falcigerum
intro: Elatostema lineolatum var. falcigerum, a lesser-known variety of Elatostema lineolatum, is a type of flowering plant in the Urticaceae family, commonly found in tropical regions of Asia. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Elatostema lineolatum var. falcigerum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain and inflammation, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems are typically dried and made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
